tracks.name: Ada
tracks.subtitle: Reliable systems, real-time software, GtkAda, and senior-level design

stages.name: Ada Foundations
topics: Types, subtypes, ranges, variables, and constants
Control flow, procedures, functions, and parameter modes
Packages, package bodies, arrays, records, and exceptions
Alire crate creation, building, running, and dependencies

stages.name: Type-System Mastery
topics: Derived, private, limited, discriminated, and modular types
Contracts, predicates, invariants, and defensive API design
Generics, containers, iterators, and controlled types

stages.name: Architecture and Object Orientation
topics: Tagged types, interfaces, dispatching, and composition
Package layering, child packages, dependency direction
Separating domain logic from UI, networking, and platform code

stages.name: GtkAda Applications
topics: GtkAda widgets, containers, signals, callbacks, and builders
Application state without unsafe global coupling
Model-view separation and reusable custom widgets
Background work, UI responsiveness, validation, and error dialogs
Build a professional desktop application using Alire and GtkAda

stages.name: Concurrency and Real-Time Ada
topics: Tasks, rendezvous, entries, protected objects, and select statements
Timing, priorities, race prevention, and deterministic execution
Ravenscar-oriented design and fault containment

stages.name: Systems and Interoperability
topics: Representation clauses, bit fields, endianness, and binary protocols
Interfaces.C, Convention C, imported functions, and safe wrappers
Networking, SDL, hardware-facing structures, and memory ownership

stages.name: Senior Ada Engineering
topics: API review, architecture decisions, testing strategy, and maintainability
Performance analysis, logging, configuration, and backward compatibility
Code reviews, refactoring plans, technical debt, and mentoring explanations

stages.name: Senior Capstone
topics: Design and implement a substantial Alire-based Ada system
Include a GtkAda interface plus independently testable domain packages
Use contracts, tests, logging, documentation, and release packaging
Defend architectural choices in a senior-level review

tracks.name: C++
tracks.subtitle: Modern C++, systems design, testing, and architecture

tracks.name: Python
tracks.subtitle: Automation, services, testing, and maintainable application design
